utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan includes a description, a total cost, and details breaking out Physical Health, Mental Health, and related add-ons with costs. This is fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a description and a cost; contents coverage specifics are not detailed, but the requirement is 'home/contents insurance with costs'—a cost is provided and coverage type indicated, so it meets the minimum specified requirement. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides description and cost—fully specified per requirement. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan provides description, total cost, and itemized details with costs—fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly total but no annual figure. Since the requirement explicitly asks for monthly/annual breakdown, this is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: (1) Health coverage references LifeFirst Standard for both physical and mental health, plus Telemedicine Services and Wellness Program. In ground-truth, LifeFirst Standard Plan has ratings: physical health = 8, mental health = 8; Telemedicine Services rating = 10; Wellness Programs rating = 10. (2) Property coverage references HomeFirst Standard Coverage, which in ground-truth has rating 7. (3) Travel coverage references TravelFirst Standard Plan, which in ground-truth has rating 8. (4) Additional services include EliteCare Premium Plan and Executive Concierge Services. EliteCare Premium Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 10; there is no ground-truth entry for Executive Concierge Services, so it should not be included in RATINGS. (5) Flexible Rider for adult children and ConsultingPro benefits are not in ground-truth ratings, so they are excluded. Therefore, map only items that exist in the ground-truth ratings.
